Telstra Corporation Limited ( (AU:TLS) ) has issued an update.

Telstra Group Limited has announced an update on its ongoing on-market buy-back program, with a total of 1,255,507 ordinary fully paid securities bought back on the previous day, adding to the cumulative total of 104,107,585 securities repurchased. This buy-back initiative is part of Telstra’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, reflecting the company’s commitment to returning capital to its investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:TLS) stock is a Hold with a A$4.80 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Telstra Corporation Limited stock, see the AU:TLS Stock Forecast page.

More about Telstra Corporation Limited

Telstra Group Limited operates within the telecommunications industry, providing a range of services including mobile, broadband, and fixed-line communications. The company is a major player in the Australian market, focusing on delivering connectivity solutions to both individual consumers and businesses.

data.title: Partners Group Private Equity Announces Sale of Convex Group Stake
data.description:

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

An update from Princess Private Equity Holding ( (GB:PEY) ) is now available.

Partners Group Private Equity Limited has announced the sale of its stake in Convex Group, a specialty property and casualty insurer, for approximately EUR 23 million, representing an 11% increase from its latest published NAV. The transaction, which is subject to regulatory approvals and expected to close in Q2 2026, underscores PGPE Ltd’s strategic focus on optimizing its investment portfolio and enhancing shareholder value.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PEY) stock is a Sell with a EUR10.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Princess Private Equity Holding stock, see the GB:PEY Stock Forecast page.

More about Princess Private Equity Holding

Partners Group Private Equity Limited (PGPE Ltd) is an investment holding company founded in 1999 and based in Guernsey. It specializes in private equity direct investments and is managed by Partners Group, a global private markets investment management firm. PGPE Ltd is listed on the London Stock Exchange and aims to provide shareholders with long-term capital growth and attractive dividend yields.

data.title: TMT Investments Announces Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

TMT Investments ( (GB:TMT) ) has shared an update.

TMT Investments Plc has announced the purchase of 80,000 of its own ordinary shares as part of a share buyback program initiated on 19 November 2025. The shares were bought at prices ranging from US$2.60 to US$2.62, with a volume-weighted average price of US$2.615. This move will reduce the company’s total voting rights to 31,291,287, potentially impacting shareholder calculations under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. The buyback is part of TMT’s strategy to manage its capital structure and enhance shareholder value.

More about TMT Investments

TMT Investments Plc is a venture capital firm that invests in high-growth technology companies globally across various specialist sectors. Founded in 2010, the company has a portfolio of over 50 companies and net assets of US$214 million as of 30 June 2025. TMT aims to generate attractive returns for shareholders primarily through capital appreciation and is listed on the AIM market of the London Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 13,785

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $81.38M

Likewise Group Plc ( (GB:LIKE) ) has provided an announcement.

Likewise Group plc, a company listed on the AIM market, has announced a transaction involving Adrian Laffey, a person discharging managerial responsibilities. On November 25, 2025, Laffey transferred 888,888 ordinary shares to a Self-Invested Personal Pension (SIPP) through a sale and immediate repurchase, resulting in no change in his beneficial ownership, which remains at 7,473,911 shares or 2.98% of the company’s issued share capital. This transaction, conducted on the London Stock Exchange, is part of routine financial management and does not alter the company’s shareholding structure.

data.title: Text S.A. Reports Decline in Profits Amid Market Challenges
data.description:
LIVECHAT Software SA ( (LCHTF) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information LIVECHAT Software SA presented to its investors.

TipRanks Black Friday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for the data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Text S.A. Group of Companies, a Polish software company, specializes in software-related activities and operates in the technology sector. The company, which includes its subsidiary Text Inc. in the USA, is known for its innovative software solutions.

In its latest earnings report for the six months ending September 30, 2025, Text S.A. reported a net profit of PLN 59,652 thousand, a decrease from the previous year’s PLN 86,327 thousand. The company also noted a decline in net revenues from sales, which amounted to PLN 167,610 thousand compared to PLN 176,252 thousand in the same period last year.

Key financial metrics indicate a challenging period for Text S.A., with operating profit dropping to PLN 65,513 thousand from PLN 92,989 thousand a year earlier. The company’s total assets decreased to PLN 178,788 thousand from PLN 226,705 thousand as of March 2025. Despite these challenges, the company maintained its focus on product development and market adaptation, particularly in AI technologies.

The company’s management remains cautiously optimistic about the future, emphasizing the importance of adapting to rapid technological changes and leveraging AI to enhance operational efficiency. They continue to monitor the economic situation and exchange rate fluctuations closely, which are critical given the company’s significant USD-denominated revenues.

SDI Limited ( (AU:SDI) ) has provided an announcement.

SDI Limited held its Annual General Meeting on November 27, 2025, where shareholders voted on several key resolutions.
